title: Using the Terminal for Web Development

questions.sentence: The terminal, or command line, is a powerful tool for developers.
Instead of using a mouse, you type commands to talk to your computer.
Most frontend developers use the terminal daily to manage their projects.
Common commands include 'ls' to list files and 'cd' to change folders.
Using the terminal is often much faster than using a Graphical User Interface.
Once you learn the basic commands, you will feel more comfortable and efficient.
